title: The Ass.
content:
God did forbid the Israelites to bring
    An ass unto Him for an offering,
    Only, by this dull creature, to express
    His detestation to all slothfulness.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Ass."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
